case_title: JOHN D HENDERSON VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

docket_entries.description: ORDER RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM(DEFENDANT)**GRANTED**
REQUEST PENDING TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF HENDERSON, JOHN D
ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52 AS TO PLAINTIFF HENDERSON, JOHN D
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY HENDERSON, JOHN D AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-03-2023 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF JOHN D HENDERSON IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY NICHELLE D. FLENTROY (CLAIMS ADJUSTER) VIA ZOOM. DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO INFORMS THE COURT THAT PARTIES HAVE SETTLED OUTSIDE COURT. COURT ORDERS CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGEPROTEM: WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SC-109 AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR NICHELLE D. FLENTROY IS APPEARING ON BEHALF OF CCSF FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
